commands.name: settings.get
commands.expectedEffect: Fake native host returns current non-secret settings fixture.
commands.errorBehavior: Reject malformed payload with sanitized bridge error.
commands.loggingPolicy: Sanitized command name and request id only; no secrets and no payload values.
commands.productionSafety: PROD_SAFE local contract only; no client launch, auth or game session.

commands.name: stream.stopPreview
commands.expectedEffect: Fake native host records a local no-op stop-preview command.
commands.errorBehavior: Reject malformed payload with sanitized bridge error.
commands.loggingPolicy: Sanitized command name and request id only; no secrets and no payload values.
commands.productionSafety: PROD_SAFE local contract only; no real stream or game session.

events.name: settings.changed
events.expectedEffect: Fake WebView handler updates local settings fixture state.
events.errorBehavior: Ignore malformed event and record sanitized bridge error.
events.loggingPolicy: Sanitized event name and request id only; no secrets and no payload values.
events.productionSafety: PROD_SAFE local contract only; no runtime user data.

events.name: stream.previewStopped
events.expectedEffect: Fake WebView handler marks local preview state as stopped.
events.errorBehavior: Ignore malformed event and record sanitized bridge error.
events.loggingPolicy: Sanitized event name and request id only; no secrets and no payload values.
events.productionSafety: PROD_SAFE local contract only; no real stream or game session.
